category_sources: Official GitHub README describes GNU FriBidi as implementing the bidirectional text algorithm and providing a fribidi command-line utility.
source_facts.description says Implementation of the Unicode BiDi algorithm.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use GNU FriBidi/FriBidi.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the main official documentation surface and points to the in-repository doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/fribidi/fribidi, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README mentions the fribidi command-line utility and bidirectional text processing.
source_facts.description identifies Unicode BiDi algorithm implementation.
